system-characteristics.description:
This architecture models the engineering-model-go repository as a model-driven toolchain.
It captures authored functional intent, export surfaces, and verification-oriented traceability.
The model is intended to guide implementation work in this repository using stable IDs and support paths.

information-types.title: Operational Data
information-types.description: Application and operational data managed by the engineered system.

authorization-boundary.description: Authorization boundary aligns with authored architecture scope and allocated components.

users.title: AI Agent
users.description: Uses MCP tools and AI JSON to plan and execute scoped implementation work.

users.title: Architecture Author
users.description: Maintains modeled structure, mappings, and architecture intent.

users.title: CI Pipeline
users.description: Executes regression tests, validation checks, and artifact generation.

users.title: Compliance Engineer
users.description: Uses control/risk and traceability outputs for assurance workflows.

users.title: Implementation Engineer
users.description: Implements code and tests guided by requirement support paths.

control-implementation.description: Control implementation allocations derived from authored controlAllocations.
